name: ls
description: List live sessions locally by default; use --federation for peers.
author: Soul-Brews-Studio

cli.help: maw ls [filter] [--all] [--json] [--fix] [--recent|-r [N]] [--active [30m|1h]] [--federation [peer]] — list local live sessions by default; use --federation for peers; see maw fleet ls for registered fleet config
